name: Biscotti Di Prato
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. In a bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another large bowl, beat eggs and sugar until light and foamy.
4. Beat in orange peel and vanilla extract. Stir in the dry ingredients. Stir in almonds.
5. Shape the dough into two logs measuring 4 x 2 inches, spaced about 4 inches apart on a baking sheet coated with butter and flour.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until firm and golden. Reduce oven temperature to 275°F and cool for 10 minutes.
7. Using a metal spatula, transfer the logs onto a cutting board. Cut diagonally into 1/2-inch slices using a large chef's knife. Place the tip of the knife on the board and press down firmly to cut cleanly through the almonds without crumbling or caramelizing. Allow to cool slightly before serving or refrigerating for later.
Jo Merrill Ex, 1 Fat Ex, 1/2 Fruit Ex, 60 cal Opt Ex
